violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Freezer or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food in a frozen state. Food in storage needs thrown away.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface RIF was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Food contact surface RIC was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave needs cleaned.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * .
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
